name: design-craft
description: Turn Claude into an opinionated, accessibility-aware, AI-slop-resistant design collaborator that produces intentional design artifacts in HTML/CSS/SVG/JS — landing pages, interactive prototypes, slide decks, wireframes, hi-fi variations, design-token extractions, and component inventories. The SKILL.md carries a full design philosophy (content discipline, purposeful aesthetics that reject AI-template tropes, visual hierarchy and rhythm, typography and color systems, WCAG accessibility, interaction states, system thinking, respecting the medium) and routes to 14 phased procedures: discovery-questions, frontend-aesthetic-direction, wireframe, make-a-deck, make-a-prototype, make-tweakable, generate-variations, design-system-extract, component-extract, accessibility-audit, ai-slop-check, hierarchy-rhythm-review, interaction-states-pass, and polish-pass. Built for Claude Code: AskUserQuestion for kickoff rounds, the Agent tool for parallel verifier fan-out, and self-contained deck-scaling / device-frame / tweak-panel code that runs as standalone files with no external dependencies. v1.1 adds expert motion design (UI motion tokens/choreography + a timeline animation medium with mp4 export), a depth/3D technique ladder (elevation, grain/mesh/glass, CSS 3D, WebGL), an aesthetic range map with named families, laws-of-composition, print-perfect documents, image generation, design-system authoring, and heavily enriched slop/typography/state-coverage/polish checklists synthesized from open-design, baoyu-design, and the upstream Claude design system prompt.
